text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rush into the waiting room to congratulate T.M.
Opera O on her victory.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The masses applaud and rejoice. I am strong, yet
elegant—unobscured brilliance incarnate.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am the high, the mighty, T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Now sing your praises of my
triumphant victory!
choice_data_list: This victory is just the beginning.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I graciously accept your kindness. Let me
gift you a few of my own...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Words of prophecy! After the next race, your
praises shall ring once again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How do I know? Because both you and the
natural world...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is already confident she'll win the next
race!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Marvelous! Trainer, you are absolutely correct.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just as my beauty persists endlessly into the
future, this forward march will not come to a halt.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Not until I, the Centurial Overlord, bring my light
of good fortune unto the entire world!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As such, it is only natural that you, my trainer,
should comprehend the philosophy of it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I make this inquiry. What is it we should do
next?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! Let us begin at once, so that I may
claim a brilliance unparalleled—and illuminate the
heavens themselves!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, in pursuit of our next victory, we
train rigorously under the shining sun!
